description: 79 - 20-02-2025 - Letter from Peter Mandelson to John Healey (Secretary of State for Defence)
text:
From the Ambassador

The Rt Hon Lord Mandelson PC

phi His Majesty's Ambassador

age 3100 Massachusetts Ave, NW
British Embassy Washington, DC 20008
Washington Tel: Personal

20 February 2025

The Rt Hon John Healey MP
Secretary of State for Defence
Ministry of Defence

Whitehall, London
SW1A 2HB

Dear John,

Personal

Lord Mandelson
British Ambassador to the United States

Copy to: Chief of Defence Staff, MOD PUS, MOD 2PUS

223
parsing_notes: Extract sender institution + signatory, addressee name + title, date, subject heading (if present), body paragraphs, and closing salutation/sign-off. Classification marking (OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE etc.) at top. Sender/recipient relationship is a directed WROTE_TO edge.

to:
Secretary of State for Defence
Ministry of Defence

Whitehall

Personal

Lord Mandelson
British Ambassador to the United States
